data.title: 国际服「The Ark of Atrahasis Conquest」活动PV公开
data.summary: ['The Ark of Atrahasis Conquest' Event Notice] Sensei, the Animation PV of 'The Ark of Atrahasis Con
data.body:
['The Ark of Atrahasis Conquest' Event Notice]

Sensei, the Animation PV of 'The Ark of Atrahasis Conquest' has just been released!
Let's go check out the students, radiant in their new attire, filled with determination and resolve!

⬇️Official YouTube (HD)⬇️
https://youtu.be/u2d8GHRzxCQ

#BlueArchive
